title: daphniphyllum neilgherrense
intro: Daphniphyllum neilgherrense, also known as the Neilgherries daphniphyllum or the Elephant's tusk plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Daphniphyllaceae. This plant is native to the Western Ghats in India and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Daphniphyllum neilgherrense include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. Daphniphyllum neilgherrense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as into extracts and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
